title: goodyera afzelii
intro: Goodyera afzelii, also known as the ruffled bellwort or lady's lips, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Goodyera afzelii include reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and aiding in the recovery from illnesses. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
